summaryItinerary: Day 1: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour
Day 2: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Overnight Cruise (Local Lunch + Local Dinner)
Day 3: Ha Long back to Ha Noi – Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Free Leisure (Breakfast + Local Brunch)
Day 4: Da Nang – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town
Day 5: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge
Day 6: Da Nang Departure – Ho Chi Minh Arrival – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Cu Chi Tunnels
Day 7: Ho Chi Minh – Join Group Day Tour to Mekong Delta

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour
details: Arrive in Ha Noi, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Visit Tran Quoc Pagoda located on Golden Fish Island in West Lake. It is the oldest pagoda in Hanoi built in the 6th century.

Continue to visit Temple of Literature – the first university of Vietnam, The Temple of Literature (Van Mieu Quoc Tu Giam) is one of the most attractive tourist spots in Northern Vietnam. The Temple of Literature was founded in 1070.

Keep going to visit Hoa Lo Prison, the prison was built by the French, from 1886 to 1901, when Vietnam was still a part of French Indochina. The French called the prison Maison Centrale. The prison was called "A Hell on Earth" and now the prison is like a war museum for those who want to understand more about the war against France of Vietnamese people.
Our bus will take you back to the hotel for check-in.
Free leisure and overnight in Ha Noi City

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay with 01 Night in Cruise (Lunch + Dinner)
details: Do hotel check-out
Pick up from Hotel in Hanoi Old Quarter or Opera Theatre House and departing for Halong
Arrive at Tuan Chau harbor, check in at the waiting room.
Get on Tender Boat to Verdure Lotus Cruise and enjoy Welcome drink, meet the captain, crew to get a brief introduction about cruise and safety guidelines. Complete check-in procedure.
Enjoy Vietnamese seafood and vegetarian lunch, while cruising in the magnificent Halong – Lan Ha Bay, admiring the fascinating rock formations in the bay.
You can choose to relax on the sundesk or explore Ba Trai Dao – Tra Bau area and the natural lagoon of Lan Ha Bay.
Come back to our Cruise and participate in our Happy Our & Cooking Class. Take photos and relax.
Dinner is served at the restaurant. After dinner, you can join the squid fishing program, relax on the sundesk…Overnight on boat.

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Long back to Ha Noi – Ha Noi Departure – Da Nang Evening Arrival – Free leisure (Breakfast + Brunch)
details: Taichi on the sundeck, sightseeing sunrise
Have breakfast. Morning view of bay's landscape with a cup of tea or coffee.
Visitors Dark and Light Cave. Here you can bamboo Boat to explore the landscape, or immerse yourself. in the cool, clear blue water of this place.
Back to your cabin, take relax and check carefully all the luggage before leaving your cabin.
Check-out from the private cabin and enjoy a fantastic cruise on the bay for room service. Complete check-out procedure. Enjoy lunch at the restaurant while the cruise is returning to the harbour.
You take the Tender boat back to Tuan Chau port.
Arrival at Tuan Chau Marina. Our bus will take you back to hotel in Ha Noi
Our driver will take you to the Noi Bai International Airport as your departure flight to Da Nang City
Arrive in Da Nang City, our driver will take you to hotel for check-in
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang - Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town
details: Free leisure in the morning
Our Tour Guide and Driver will pick you up at your hotel in the city center and start Marble Mountains, Bay Mau Coconut Forest & Hoi An Acient Town Tour.

Marble Mountain is a complex consisting of Kim (Iron Mountain), Mộc (Wood Mountain), Thủy (Water Mountain), Hỏa (Fire Mountain), Thổ (Earth Mountain) symbolizing for 5 main elements of the universe in Asia Culture. You will discover the mysterious beauty of caves combining the sacred atmosphere of Buddhism. Visiting Tam Thai Pagoda, Linh Ung Pagoda.
You will admire the masterpieces of exquisite stone sculptures created by the skilful hands of artisans in Non Nuoc village at the foot of the mountain.
We continue our trip to visit Bay Mau Coconut Forest Tour, you will be explored in Bay Mau coconut forest space by traditional basket boats.
Departure to visit Hoi An Ancient Town
Take a short break

Visit Hoi An Acient town, with Japanese Bridge. This only remain of Japanses culture is now considered as a symbol of Hoi An. Taking a walk on the street along the Hoai River, enjoy the night life of Hoi An Town.
Car and tour guide will take you back to the hotel.
Overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge
details: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel, depart for Ba Na Hill through one of the most beautiful seaside streets of Central Vietnam.

Arrive in Ba Na, you will have a chance to experience the two – UNESCO - record cable system up to the top of the hill and enjoy the beautiful sight of Mo stream, Toc Tien waterfall with the impressive dazzling white spume.
Sightseeing on Ba Na Hill to
Hand of the gods hold Vietnam's Golden Bridge.
L'Jardin Zone with French Architecture Building: Tinh Tâm Garden, French Stable, one hundred-year-old pomelo tree, Old Villas.
Linh Ung Pagoda, 27 meters Buddha Statue, Loc Uyen Garden.
From Debay station, you will get on the second cable system to move to Nui Chua Peak – the rooftop of Da nang City.
Continue the tour with Fantasy Park – one of the most modern indoor game centers of the Asia.
Visit Chua Linh Tu Temple, enjoy a panoramic view of the whole Da Nang city and Da Nang Bay through the mist in a romantic afternoon on Ba Na peak.
Go down by the cable system. Get on coach and return the city centre.
Drop off at your hotel.
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang Departure – Ho Chi Minh Arrival – Join Group Cu Chi Tunnels Afternoon Tour
details: Do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you directly to the Da Nang International Airport as your departure flight to Ho Chi Minh City
Arrive in Ho Chi Minh City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Pick up at your hotel and depart to Cu Chi will take approximately one and a half hours bus driving.

Upon arrival, before exploring the tunnels, you will have some short introduction followed by an introductory video about how the tunnels were constructed and how the people survived in the harsh conditions of the war time. Then, spend your time to explore the remaining area and tunnel systems which included the special constructed living areas with kitchens, bedrooms side by side with other martial facilities like storage, weapons factories, field hospitals, and command centers helping whoever lives inside the tunnels meet their basic needs. Besides, there are also many hidden trap doors and dangerous traps within the maze-like tunnels for security purpose during the war.
Return to hotel in Saigon for check-in
Free leisure and overnight in Ho Chi Minh City

detailedItinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh – Join Group Day Tour to Mekong Delta
details: Leaving the hustle and bustle of Ho Chi Minh City and start your trip to depart for My Tho, the town lies on the left side of the Mekong River. Upon arrival, visit Vinh Trang pagoda which sated back to the late 19th century. Then boarding the sampan and cruising down the river around the four beautiful islands known as Dragon, Unicorn, Phoenix and Tortoise islands.
Stop over at Unicorn Island, go walking around country lane and seeing orchards, enjoy tropical fruits, folk song music which performed by the local people. Visit the fruit plantation.
Riding a hand-rowed sampan through Thoi Son canal and treat yourself in the beauty of the countryside, visit the family business, visit honey-bee farm, enjoy honey tea and coconut candy workshop.
Break time.

In the afternoon, time for cycling around the Tan Thach village, meet the local villagers to experience the local daily life in the Mekong delta. Hammock relaxing and enjoy cool breeze for those can't join the cycling trip.
Return to Ho Chi Minh City
Free leisure and overnight in Ho Chi Minh City

detailedItinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Departure
details: Do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you directly to the Tan Son Nhat International Airport as your departure flight
